project_type: Flutter mobile app - Fantasy Cricket Platform
build_system: Flutter CLI (flutter pub get, flutter build)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze to confirm no errors. No unit tests exist in this project so static analysis is the verification path.
environment_constraints: Network mode unknown - flutter SDK is pre-installed. No Docker. Cannot run the app (no emulator). Verification limited to flutter analyze. DO NOT push or create PRs.
contribution_requirements: Commit on branch pr/realtime-ranking-preview. Do not push. Follow Clean Architecture pattern (data/domain/presentation layers). Use Riverpod for state management. Use Supabase for backend (NOT Firebase for data).
key_patterns: StateNotifier pattern with copyWith for state management. SupabaseClient from supabaseClientProvider. Realtime channels use _client.channel().onPostgresChanges().subscribe(). Models have fromJson/toJson/copyWith. Screens use ConsumerWidget. Routes use GoRouter with context.push/pop. AppColors/AppTypography/AppSpacing for theming.
directory_structure: lib/features/{auth,home,matches,contests,fantasy,wallet,groups,profile,notifications,admin} each with data/domain/presentation. lib/core has constants, network, router, storage, theme, utils. lib/shared has widgets and components. sql/ has database setup scripts.
